---
title: "Visualizando Distribuciones"
---

# Librerías

```{python}
import altair as alt
import pandas as pd
from vega_datasets import data
```

# Dataset
```{python}
movies = pd.read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/erickedu85/dataset/master/movies.csv")
movies.head()
movies.info()
```

# Gráfico de puntos
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies).mark_point().encode(
    alt.X('runtime')
)

```

## Rugplot
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies).mark_tick().encode(
    alt.X('runtime')
)
```

## Histograma
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('runtime', bin=alt.Bin(step=10)),
    alt.Y('count()')
)
```

## Gráfico de densidad o KDE

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies).transform_density(
    'runtime',
    as_ = ['runtime','density']
).mark_area().encode(
    alt.X('runtime:Q'),
    alt.Y('density:Q')
)
```

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies).transform_density(
    'runtime',
    groupby=['genre'],
    as_ = ['runtime','density'],
    steps=100
).mark_area(opacity=0.5).encode(
    alt.X('runtime:Q'),
    alt.Y('density:Q', stack=None),
    alt.Color('genre')
)
```

```{python}
density = alt.Chart(movies[:10]).transform_density(
    'runtime',
    as_ = ['runtime','density']
).mark_area(opacity=0.5).encode(
    alt.X('runtime:Q'),
    alt.Y('density:Q', stack=None)
)


tick = alt.Chart(movies[:10]).mark_tick(
    color='black',
    yOffset=140
).encode(
    alt.X('runtime')
)

density + tick

```

# Dataset movies from Vega

```{python}
movies_extended = data.movies().dropna(subset=['Major_Genre'])
movies_extended.head()
```

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('Worldwide_Gross',bin=alt.Bin(maxbins=100)),
    alt.Y('count()'),
    alt.Color('Major_Genre')
)
```

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).transform_density(
    'Worldwide_Gross',
    as_=['Worldwide_Gross','density'],
    groupby=['Major_Genre']
).mark_area(opacity=0.5).encode(
    alt.X('Worldwide_Gross'),
    alt.Y('density:Q', stack=None),
    alt.Color('Major_Genre')
).interactive()
```

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('mean(Worldwide_Gross)'),
    alt.Y('Major_Genre')
)
```

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_tick().encode(
    alt.X('Worldwide_Gross'),
    alt.Y('Major_Genre'),
    tooltip=['Title:N']
)
```

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_rect().encode(
    alt.X('Worldwide_Gross', bin=alt.Bin(step=100e6)),
    alt.Y('Major_Genre'),
    alt.Color('count()'),
    tooltip=['count()']
).interactive()
```

## Boxplot - caja y bigotes

```{python}
bar = alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('mean(Worldwide_Gross)'),
    alt.Y('Major_Genre')
)

blox = alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_boxplot().encode(
    alt.X('Worldwide_Gross'),
    alt.Y('Major_Genre'),
    alt.Size('count()')
)

blox | bar

```


# Análisis Bivariado: Cuantitativo - Cuantitativo

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_point().encode(
    alt.X('IMDB_Rating'),
    alt.Y('Rotten_Tomatoes_Rating')
)
```

## Heatmap
```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_rect().encode(
    alt.X('IMDB_Rating', bin=alt.Bin(maxbins=60)),
    alt.Y('Rotten_Tomatoes_Rating', bin=alt.Bin(maxbins=60)),
    alt.Color('count()')
)
```

# Análisis Bivariado: Categórico - Categórico

```{python}
movies_extended = movies_extended[movies_extended['MPAA_Rating'].isin(['G','PG','PG-13','R'])]

alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('count()', stack='normalize'),
    alt.Y("Major_Genre", sort='x'),
    alt.Color('MPAA_Rating')
)
```

## Facetas
```{python}

alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('count()'),
    alt.Y('MPAA_Rating'),
    alt.Color('MPAA_Rating'),
    tooltip=[
        'count()'
    ]
).properties(
    width=90,
    height=70
).facet(
    'Major_Genre',
    columns=4,
)
```

```{python}

alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('count()'),
    alt.Y('Major_Genre'),
    alt.Color('Major_Genre'),
    tooltip=[
        'count()'
    ]
).properties(
    width=100,
    height=130
).facet(
    'MPAA_Rating',
    columns=4,
)
```

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_rect().encode(
    alt.X('MPAA_Rating'),
    alt.Y('Major_Genre', sort='color'),
    alt.Color('count()'),
    tooltip=['count()']
)
```

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_circle().encode(
    alt.X('MPAA_Rating'),
    alt.Y('Major_Genre', sort='color'),
    alt.Color('count()'),
    alt.Size('count()'),
    tooltip=['count()']
)
```
